name: RACE Framework (Reach, Act, Convert, Engage)
description: Customer lifecycle framework covering full journey from awareness to advocacy. Integrates with SOSTAC for tactical execution structure.
best_for: Full lifecycle marketing plan; campaign structure; customer journey execution; channel-stage mapping

name: See-Think-Do-Care Framework (Google)
description: Audience-intent framework mapping content and channels to customer mindset across four intent stages.
best_for: Audience-intent content strategy; content-channel mapping; preventing over-focus on bottom-funnel

name: Growth Loops vs. Funnels
description: Compares linear funnel models with self-reinforcing growth loops (viral, content, paid, sales).
best_for: Self-reinforcing growth strategy; viral mechanics; product-led growth; reducing paid dependency

name: Bullseye Framework for Channel Prioritization
description: Systematic 3-ring approach testing 19 traction channels to find the best growth channel.
best_for: Channel discovery and prioritization; traction testing; startup channel strategy

name: ICE Scoring for Experiment Prioritization
description: Fast scoring method (Impact x Confidence x Ease) for ranking marketing experiments.
best_for: Experiment prioritization; initiative ranking; sprint planning; weekly prioritization

name: AARRR Pirate Metrics
description: Five-stage lifecycle measurement framework: Acquisition, Activation, Retention, Revenue, Referral.
best_for: Product-led growth metrics; lifecycle measurement; startup KPI framework

name: Customer Journey Mapping
description: Process for visualizing complete customer experience, identifying gaps and moments of truth.
best_for: Understanding customer experience; touchpoint analysis; gap identification; content mapping

name: Marketing Maturity Model
description: 5-stage assessment of marketing sophistication from Ad Hoc to Optimized.
best_for: Assessing marketing sophistication; client readiness evaluation; setting appropriate recommendations

name: Budget Allocation Models
description: 70/20/10 rule plus business-stage allocation models with channel mix optimization.
best_for: Budget planning and allocation; channel mix optimization; spend distribution by stage

name: Framework Selection Guide
description: Decision tree for choosing the right framework plus recommended combining stack.
best_for: Choosing which framework to apply; combining frameworks; comprehensive engagement planning
